name: components/hover-card
description: A lightweight preview card that appears on hover (with optional focus support) and disappears when the pointer leaves. Similar to a tooltip but designed to host richer content such as headers, descriptions, and media. Built on Kobalte HoverCard with configurable open and close delays, multiple placements, and smooth fade/zoom/slide animations. Uses ARIA hover-card semantics for accessibility.
useCases: User profile previews that show avatar, name, role, and follow button on hover
Product quick-look cards in e-commerce grids revealing price, rating, and add-to-cart
Link destination previews in social feeds or wikis before the user clicks through
Issue or PR hover cards in developer tools showing status, assignee, and labels
